mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT po.purchase_id AS purchaseId, po.cust_code AS custCode, po.status AS status, st.code_contents AS statusName, po.request_date AS requestDate, po.total_price AS totalPrice, po.inbound_date AS inboundDate, po.reg_emp_no AS regEmpNo, po.reg_date AS regDate, po.cancel_reason AS cancelReason FROM purchase_order po LEFT JOIN status_type st ON st.bcode = 520 AND st.mcode = po.status ORDER BY po.purchase_id DESC ) a ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT pd.purchase_id AS purchaseId, pd.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, pd.purchase_amount AS purchaseAmount, pd.purchase_product_price AS purchaseProductPrice, pd.reg_emp_no AS regEmpNo, pd.reg_date AS regDate FROM purchase_detail pd JOIN product p ON pd.product_code = p.product_code WHERE pd.purchase_id = #{purchaseId}
SELECT product_code AS productCode, product_name AS productName, product_price AS productPrice FROM product WHERE product_status = 0 ORDER BY product_code
SELECT cust_code AS custCode, cust_name AS custName FROM cust_table WHERE cust_type = 1 ORDER BY cust_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_order ( purchase_id, cust_code, status, request_date, total_price, inbound_date, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( seq_purchase_id.NEXTVAL, #{custCode}, 1, SYSDATE, #{totalPrice}, #{inboundDate}, #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO purchase_detail ( purchase_id, product_code, purchase_amount, purchase_product_price, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( seq_purchase_id.CURRVAL, #{productCode}, #{purchaseAmount}, #{purchaseProductPrice}, #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_order SET cust_code = #{custCode}, inbound_date = #{inboundDate}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, status = #{status}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE purchase_id = #{purchaseId}
